parameters.query: SELECT cp.id, cp.opportunity, cp.agency, cp.contract_value, cp.plan_data->>'naics_code' as naics, cp.plan_data->>'stage' as stage, cp.plan_data->>'known_competitors' as known_competitors, cp.plan_data->>'fpds_last_enriched' as last_enriched FROM gda_capture_plans cp WHERE cp.plan_data IS NOT NULL AND (cp.plan_data->>'fpds_last_enriched' IS NULL OR cp.plan_data->>'fpds_last_enriched' < (NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days')::text) ORDER BY cp.contract_value DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 10

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ interaction_type: 'fpds_enrichment', entity_type: 'capture_plan', entity_id: String($json.plan_id || $('Parse Award History').first().json.plan_id || ''), action: 'enrich', content: JSON.stringify({ plan_id: $('Parse Award History').first().json.plan_id, awards_analyzed: ($('Parse Award History').first().json.landscape || {}).total_awards_analyzed || 0 }), content_type: 'competitive_intel', source: 'fpds_enrichment', title: 'FPDS enrichment ' + new Date().toISOString() }) }}
